info.title: LEIA Partner API v1
info.description: REST API for programmatic course creation. All endpoints are server-to-server only — authenticated via LEIA API keys.

bearerAuth.description: LEIA API key passed as Bearer token (recommended). Keys start with `leia_sk_`.

apiKeyHeader.name: X-API-Key
apiKeyHeader.description: LEIA API key as custom header (fallback).

contentLanguage.description: Primary language for generated course content (ISO 639-1, e.g. 'en', 'ko', 'ja')

supportedLanguages.description: Additional languages supported in the course

culturalContext.description: Cultural framing for examples and scenarios

title.example: Ontology Engineering and AI Knowledge Systems

slug.description: A unique, URL-friendly slug containing only lowercase alphanumeric characters and hyphens

description.description: A detailed description of the course content and learning goals
description.example: Learn practical ontology design, semantic web standards, and knowledge graph engineering.

contentLanguage.description: Primary language for generated course content (ISO 639-1)

supportedLanguages.description: Additional languages supported in the course

isPrivate.description: Whether the course is private to enrolled members only

thumbnail.description: An HTTPS URL to a thumbnail image for the course

sourceFileUrl.description: Remote HTTPS file URL to parse

pdfUrl.description: Remote HTTPS PDF URL to parse

fileUrl.description: Remote HTTPS file URL to parse

draftCourseId.description: Existing draft course ID to update

sourceFileUrl.description: Remote HTTPS URL for source content

lessonIds.description: Lesson IDs to generate content for
Lesson IDs to generate slides for
Lesson IDs to export as video (must have slidesStatus: READY)
List of specific lesson IDs to export. If empty or omitted, exports all valid lecture lessons in the course.

jobId.description: The background job ID of the PDF export process.

IdempotencyKey.description: Idempotency key for safe retries. Supported on all POST endpoints.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing, invalid, or revoked API key

403.description: Forbidden — valid key but insufficient permissions

error.message: API key service user must be a CREATOR user
Idempotency-Key was reused with a different request body

tags.name: Lessons
tags.description: Generate lesson content, slides, and video

tags.name: Exports
tags.description: Export course content as PDFs, video, or files

tags.name: RAG Documents
tags.description: Upload and monitor source documents for RAG processing

post.description: Parses a natural-language course description and/or remote source files into structured course form data.

example.prompt: Create a Python fundamentals course for beginners.

post.description: Starts an async curriculum generation job from instructions and source materials.

get.description: Polls the status of an async curriculum generation job.

post.description: Creates a full course with curriculum structure from generated data.

get.description: Retrieves full course payload including chapters and lessons.

patch.description: Updates course details such as title, description, language, and thumbnail. Only provided fields are updated.

get.description: Lists background jobs for a course, optionally filtered by status.
Retrieves source-document processing status for a course.
Lists video exports for a course.

post.description: Kicks off a background job to export course lessons as PDF. Supports safe retries using `Idempotency-Key`.

get.description: Retrieves completed PDF export jobs with download links.
Retrieves a lesson's content by course and lesson slugs.

post.description: Starts an async background job that generates AI content for all specified lessons in a course.

example.customInstructions: Use concise examples with practical code snippets.

post.description: Generates illustrated slide presentations for multiple lessons using the nano-banana method. Requires a slide template.

200.description: Array of slide generation job objects, one per lesson

post.description: Exports slides as MP4 video for multiple lessons. Requires lessons to have slidesStatus: READY.

200.description: Array of video export job objects, one per lesson

post.description: Triggers AI content generation for a specific lesson.
Triggers slide deck and audio narration generation for a specific lesson.

get.description: Retrieves a single background job by its ID.
Polls the status of an active course PDF export job.

post.description: Uploads one source document as multipart/form-data, stores it, creates a RAG document record, and starts asynchronous processing. If neither courseId nor draftCourseId is supplied, a new draftCourseId is returned. Idempotency is scoped to upload metadata and file checksum.

courseId.description: Existing course ID to attach the document to

draftCourseId.description: Draft course ID to attach the document to before course creation

get.description: Retrieves source-document processing status for documents uploaded before a course exists.
